live_database_execution.reason: This shell has no local Supabase CLI or psql client available.

legacy_guest_field_mapping.guests.eta: reservations.check_in_date using eta::date, falling back to guests.created_at::date/current_date when eta is null
legacy_guest_field_mapping.guests.etd: reservations.check_out_date using etd::date when not before check_in_date, otherwise check_in_date

csv_irregularity_evidence: database_design/reservations_data.csv carries Listing titles but no provider listing ID, for example line 2: Cochinchine Delxue flat at the city #Central.
database_design/Ruby.csv line 5 uses an internal label variant with double spacing: LL  - Milk 2 & Coffee 2.
supabase/migrations/20260409045100_add_channel_listings_and_room_mappings.sql seeds exact aliases for title/internal/composite variants instead of relying on fuzzy title matching.

executable_sql_checks.name: run repeat-safe guest backfill
executable_sql_checks.expected: First run creates reservations for guests not already in legacy_guest_reservation_backfills; later runs return zero new reservations for already-backfilled guests.

executable_sql_checks.name: compare eligible guest count to backfill bridge count
sql: JOIN reservations r ON r.id = b.reservation_id
JOIN guests g ON g.id = b.guest_id
AND r.primary_room_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM g.room_id
executable_sql_checks.expected: legacy_guest_count equals backfilled_guest_count, and semantically_preserved_count equals backfilled_guest_count after the migration is applied to a fully seeded database.

executable_sql_checks.name: spot-check one migrated legacy guest
sql: JOIN guests g ON g.id = b.guest_id
JOIN reservations r ON r.id = b.reservation_id
LEFT JOIN reservation_room_allocations a ON a.reservation_id = r.id
executable_sql_checks.expected: The reservation row preserves guest name, property, room, normalized status, and stay dates derived from eta/etd.

executable_sql_checks.name: provider import uses raw payload for earnings only
executable_sql_checks.expected: Returns zero rows; CSV Earnings values belong in provider_reservation_import_rows.raw_payload and reservation_external_refs.payload_metadata only.
